pass_criteria_met: Correctly lists all 5 steps in order
Identifies parallel execution of Steps 2 and 3
Correctly states the reason (independent artifacts, Semantic Scholar rate limits)
Step 4 must be ONE single call
execution_log: Read skills/paper-orchestra/SKILL.md. Listed 5 steps: (1) Outline Generation (outline-agent, 1 call, ol.json), (2) Plotting (plotting-agent, ~20-30 calls, fig/*.png + cc.json), (3) Lit Review (literature-review, ~20-30 calls, intro.md + refs.bib), (4) Section Writing (section-writing, 1 call, drafts/manuscript.md), (5) Content Refinement (content-refinement-agent, ~5-7 calls, final/manuscript.md). Steps 2 and 3 run in parallel due to independence and Semantic Scholar rate limits (Step 3 slower).
model_notes: Nemotron 3 correctly identified all 5 pipeline steps with sub-skill invocations, call counts, and output files. Correctly noted Steps 2 and 3 are parallelizable due to independence and that Step 3 should run first if parallel not supported due to Semantic Scholar 1 QPS limit.
